scope_summary: Restore the public waitlist form so submissions are detected by Netlify again, redirect to a real confirmation page, and stop the broken 404 flow after submit.

legal_and_regulatory.rationale: The change repairs an existing consented contact flow and does not expand the scope of data collection or claims.
evidence: contact.html still requires explicit consent_to_process before submit
waitlist-success.html only confirms receipt and makes no new promises

privacy_local_first_promise.rationale: The website still only collects the same limited waitlist fields the user intentionally submits.
evidence: contact.html fields remain name, email, what_is_needed, and consent_to_process
netlify.toml only re-enables HTML form detection for the existing public form

medical_scope_and_claims.rationale: The legal boundary text remains in place and the confirmation page adds no medical or clinical claims.
evidence: contact.html warns users not to submit medical, insurance, or crisis information
waitlist-success.html contains only acknowledgement copy

behavioral_science_alignment.rationale: The repaired flow removes a dead-end failure state and replaces it with a clear confirmation step, reducing friction and uncertainty.
evidence: waitlist-success.html provides a short confirmation and clear next links
The broken query-string thank-you state was removed from contact.html

neurodivergence_research_alignment.rationale: The new flow lowers cognitive load by giving one unambiguous outcome after submit instead of a confusing 404.
evidence: waitlist-success.html uses short paragraphs and two clear navigation choices
No extra steps, popups, or manipulative retry patterns were added

user_benefit_and_harm_check.rationale: Users can now join the waitlist without hitting a broken page, which restores trust and reduces the chance of lost interest.
evidence: Live browser submission now reaches /waitlist-success
Netlify now registers the waitlist form again

brand_voice_and_claims.rationale: The confirmation copy stays plain, direct, and non-hype.
evidence: waitlist-success.html title and body are short and factual
No new benefit or outcome claims were introduced

accessibility_and_inclusion.rationale: The form keeps native labels and controls, and the success page is simple to scan with keyboard-accessible links.
evidence: contact.html preserves labeled inputs and checkbox
waitlist-success.html uses standard links and readable text blocks

security_and_reliability.rationale: The fix is static-site configuration and HTML only, with no new secrets, privileged code, or backend added.
evidence: netlify.toml enables existing HTML form detection
No auth, database, or server-side application code changed

monetization_and_dark_pattern_check.rationale: The repaired waitlist remains optional and does not pressure users into purchases or hidden signups.
evidence: contact.html retains the same optional waitlist framing
waitlist-success.html offers clear exit paths back to the site

ship_decision.conditions: Ship now; separately verify whether form notification emails should be routed to chaoscontrol@divergify.app because that notification setting is not yet confirmed.
